message:
fix: close descendant wisps before closing molecule roots

Three lifecycle paths closed molecule roots without first closing
their children, leaking ~10 orphan wisps per cycle into the DB:

- patrol_report.go: witness/refinery patrol cycle end
- handoff.go: session handoff molecule cleanup
- sling_helpers.go: re-sling molecule burn

Now all three call forceCloseDescendants() before closing the root,
matching the correct pattern already used in polecat nuke and
molecule_lifecycle burn.

This is the root cause of hundreds of rogue wisps accumulating in
gastown, beads, and HQ issue tables (Clown Show #21 pollution).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
